metadata.title: Enrique Becerra — Web development for freelancers and SMBs
metadata.description: Tech Architect Lead specialized in Next.js, Sanity CMS and modern web architectures. I help freelancers and small businesses build a professional digital presence.
metadata.ogDescription: Tech Architect Lead. Websites built with architectural rigor for freelancers and SMBs.
metadata.twitterDescription: Tech Architect Lead. Websites built with architectural rigor.

hero.tagline: Tech Architect Lead — I build software that works, trains teams and lasts.

commands.help: Commands: whoami, cat role.txt, ./skills --top, echo $status, pwd, ls, exit, git blame
commands.gitBlame: all the good → enrique, all the bad → the coffee

about.title: A bit about me 📖
about.bio1: I'm a software architect with 8 years of experience, specialized in Magnolia CMS and the Java ecosystem. I currently lead technical teams at VASS and coordinate the VassNolia community at VASS University.
about.bio2: I like to understand how things work under the hood. I enjoy both building solid solutions and explaining and teaching them to others. If something can be done better, curiosity kicks in until I figure out how.
about.bio3: Outside of work: geek, chronically curious, and someone who also knows there's life beyond the keyboard.

services.title: What I build for you
services.lead: Three clear ways to work together, with scope and indicative pricing from the first conversation.

process.title: From idea to live site in 4 steps
process.lead: No surprises, no endless consulting. A short, clear path from first call to delivery.

contact.title: Let's talk 💌
contact.description: Got an interesting project, an idea, or just want to connect? Drop me a line.
